<!-- Thanks for the PR! -->

## What does this PR change?
<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type
- [ ] New checklist item(s)
- [ ] Edit existing checklist item(s)
- [ ] Tool / CLI change
- [ ] Docs / notes
- [ ] Other:

## For checklist edits

- [ ] The new/edited item follows the `id: Lx-NNN` format
- [ ] `weight` reflects severity (1 minor / 2 important / 3 critical)
- [ ] `rationale` and `mitigation` are concrete, not hand-wavy
- [ ] I cited a paper / CVE / incident when applicable

## For tool changes

- [ ] `python tools/llm-audit/audit.py --non-interactive` still works
- [ ] `python tools/llm-audit/audit.py --answers tools/llm-audit/example-answers.json` still produces a sensible report
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies introduced

## Links / References
<!-- Paper, CVE, issue, related PR -->
